name: Diminishing Returns
tagline: Gravecrawler + Phyrexian Altar + sac/drain loop (Teysa doubles)
idea: The deck converts creatures into damage through a three-part engine:

briefKills.line: Gravecrawler + Phyrexian Altar + a sac outlet → infinite deaths → drain (deterministic)
Gray Merchant of Asphodel + heavy black devotion → ETB drain ×2

openings: Weakest axis — Kill reliability (4/5): the judges' soft spot.
Aristocrats board fallback (death volume) not in predicate — watch.
Decap never-closes in 4% of goldfish games — a grind risk.
Tables (all three) never-close 70% of the time.

clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T9; the full table around >T14.

gamePlan: The deck converts creatures into damage through a three-part engine:
winLine: Gravecrawler + Phyrexian Altar + sac/drain loop (Teysa doubles)

finishers.name: Gravecrawler Loop
finishers.note: Gravecrawler + Phyrexian Altar + any Zombie on the battlefield + any drain payoff.

finishers.name: Gray Merchant Recursion
finishers.note: Gray Merchant's drain is an ETB trigger, so Teysa does *not* double it.

finishers.name: Kokusho Drain Chain
finishers.note: Kokusho dies → each opponent loses 5, you gain 15.

finishers.name: Living Death Reset
finishers.note: Stock the graveyard through self-mill (Stitcher's Supplier, Altar of Dementia), looting, and natural play.

finishers.name: Razaketh Tutor Chain
finishers.note: Razaketh pays 2 life + sacrifices a creature to tutor any card.

rulings.name: Teysa doubles DEATH triggers only.
rulings.note: She does NOT double Gray Merchant (ETB), Mirkwood Bats (token create/sac), or Morbid Opportunist (capped once/turn). She doubles the number of triggers, not each effect.

rulings.name: Agent of the Iron Throne is a Background enchantment
rulings.note: not a creature — it grants Teysa a death-drain ability, which Teysa then doubles.

rulings.name: Sephiroth front face is a sac outlet + draw engine + single-target drain
rulings.note: (not each opponent). After 4 trigger-resolutions = 2 deaths with Teysa, he transforms. The back-face emblem drain is not doubled but persists if Sephiroth is later removed — real durability.

rulings.name: K'rrik converts each {B} pip to 2 life
rulings.note: (changes how you pay coloured, not generic) and adds 3 devotion for Gary. Drain triggers pay the life back with interest.

rulings.name: Edict creatures (Merciless Executioner, Plaguecrafter) are ETB edicts
rulings.note: not death triggers — not doubled, but they double as fodder.

rulings.name: Endrek Sahr self-sacrifices at 7+ Thrulls
rulings.note: fine here, since the death payoffs happily eat both the Thrulls and Endrek.

SIDEBOARD:
1 Fleshbag Marauder

1 Teysa Karlov

keep.mixed: aristocrats board fallback (death volume) not in predicate — watch

mull.strategy: Looking for: a sac outlet + a drain payoff + lands, ideally with Teysa or a reanimation spell behind it. The Gravecrawler + Phyrexian Altar infinite is upside, not the requirement — it fires in ~3% of goldfish games, and death volume (outlet + payoff + bodies) is the real clock. Never mulligan toward the combo; keep the sac-outlet-plus-drain shape even when no combo piece is in sight.

killTree.title: Diminishing Returns — Teysa Karlov
killTree.root:
Teysa Karlov online
every death trigger fires TWICE
killTree.stall:
grind deaths — the table drain is slow (T12+);
this deck disrupts, it doesn't race
killTree.caption: parallel vectors — they stack, not rank

lines.need:
Gravecrawler + Phyrexian Altar
+ a sac outlet

Gray Merchant of Asphodel
+ heavy black devotion

Kokusho, the Evening Star
+ a sac outlet

Razaketh, the Foulblooded
+ fodder to sacrifice
